description: Hard task with incomplete EHR notes requiring request_lab before safe enrollment.

trials.exclusion_criteria: History of diabetic ketoacidosis in the last 12 months.

trials.inclusion_criteria: Thyroid follow-up with TSH between 0.5 and 5.0 mIU/L.
Supportive oncology care with platelet > 150000 and ANC > 1500.
